visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top with white off-the-shoulder sleeves, stands in front of a glass-door freezer. She is gesturing enthusiastically while looking at the camera. A large Costco Wholesale logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the freezer shelves, revealing boxes of 'Tsujiri Matcha' and 'Kenji Kyoto Matcha' ice cream bars. A price tag of $469 is visible on the shelf edge. (3) The perspective returns to the woman, who continues talking and pointing at the freezer. A second person's hand briefly enters the frame to poke her playfully. (4) She holds up a green box of Kenji Kyoto Matcha ice cream bars, showing the packaging design which features a matcha bar and a bowl of tea. (5) The setting shifts to a cozy indoor living room. Two women are seated at a table covered with boxes of the ice cream bars. Both are holding and eating the light-green matcha bars while discussing them. One woman wears a blue beret. (6) Close-up shots focus on the texture of the ice cream bars as they are bitten, emphasizing the frozen green surface.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 京都抹茶冰棒來了. (2) [Subtitle]: 什麼去年的事. (3) [Slogan]: 辻利抹茶. (4) [Slogan]: $469. (5) [Variety]: 你的陰謀吧. (6) [Subtitle]: 健司京都抹茶冰棒. [Slogan]: 京都極上宇治抹茶.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the first half, joined by 1 female friend in the second half.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator has long dark hair and wears a black dress with white puffy off-shoulder sleeves. Her friend wears a white top and a blue beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First location is a Costco freezer aisle with rows of refrigerated products. Second location is an indoor living room with a shelf, a yellow plush toy, and boxes of ice cream on a table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice greeting the audience over a fast-tempo, upbeat synth-pop BGM. (2) A 'ding' SFX punctuates the mention of a price change, with the speaker's pitch rising in surprise. (3) A new audio phase starts as a second female voice joins in; the two voices overlap with laughter and conversational banter as they describe the taste. (4) Percussive impact SFX are used during quick visual cuts showing the product box. (5) The voices maintain high arousal and positive valence, concluding with a recommendation delivered in a clear, narrative-style broadcast tone.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and promote the new 'Kenji Kyoto Matcha' ice cream bars found at Costco, highlighting the brand change, price reduction, and providing a sensory evaluation through a taste test.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on showcasing a specific brand of ice cream (Kenji) at a specific retailer (Costco), including price information and a detailed review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-energy editing and social-media style text overlays to engage a young audience interested in food trends and shopping deals.
